title: aquilegia atrata subsp. vulgaris
intro: Aquilegia atrata subsp. vulgaris, also known as the Yellow Columbine, is a flowering plant species within the Ranunculaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Aquilegia atrata subsp. vulgaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
